response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:54: Identified as an introductory talking segment by the VTuber Tokoyami Towa. 2. 02:55: Performance of the song 'シルベ' begins. 3. 03:06: On-screen text '作詞・作曲・編曲：古閑理平 (YOURNESS)' identifies the composer. 4. Manually transcribed the full lyrics from the video as web search results did not provide them directly. 5. Set original language to Japanese and English translation to null as no verified translation was found.
response.global_summary: This video features a long introductory segment where VTuber Tokoyami Towa talks to her audience, followed by a live, fully vocalized performance of the song 'シルベ' (Shirube), which she co-composed with Koga Rihei of YOURNESS.

scenes.description: Tokoyami Towa introduces herself and talks about her live performance and the upcoming song.
Tokoyami Towa performs the song 'シルベ'. The video includes on-screen lyrics and credits for the song's composition.
